narrative:
Broadview Heights-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 736 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.8 percentage points.
